zh.lifeSummary: 當Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon於1170年7月1日出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利時，他的父親Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau23歲，母親Alswn Ferch Cadwallon31歲。他於1197年與Juliana de Mortimer在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon于1170年7月1日出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利时，他的父亲Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau23岁，母亲Alswn Ferch Cadwallon31岁。他于1197年与Juliana de Mortimer在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Dolphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dolfin, apparently from an Anglo-Scandinavian formation, Dólgfinnr (possibly from Old Norse dolgr, dólgr ‘mortal enemy’ + the ethnic name Finnr), but there is disagreement about whether or not this might be a Scandinavianized form of Old French Delfin (from Latin Delphinus, from the word meaning ‘dolphin’). The surname was taken to Ireland at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century, and the original bearers of the name settled in County Galway. The family became bilingual and the name has sometimes been Gaelicized as Doilfin.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon was born on 1 July 1170, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau, was 23 and his mother, Alswn Ferch Cadwallon, was 31. He married Juliana de Mortimer in 1197, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon est né le 1 juillet 1170, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alswn Ferch Cadwallon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Juliana de Mortimer en 1197, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon am 1. Juli 1170 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau 23 und seine Mutter Alswn Ferch Cadwallon 31. Er hat 1197 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Juliana de Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon è nato il il 1 luglio 1170 nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alswn Ferch Cadwallon, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Juliana de Mortimer nel 1197, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofonが1170年7月1日にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで生まれた時，父Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannauは23歳，母Alswn Ferch Cadwallonは31歳であった。1197年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーでJuliana de Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon(이)가 1170년 7월 1일 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alswn Ferch Cadwallon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1197년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Juliana de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon nasceu em 1 de julho de 1170, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alswn Ferch Cadwallon, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Mortimer em 1197, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon родился 1 июля 1170 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alswn Ferch Cadwallon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Mortimer в 1197 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon nació el 1 de julio de 1170, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Dolffyn ap Rhiwallon of Nannau, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alswn Ferch Cadwallon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Juliana de Mortimer en 1197, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
